name: Image Prompt Quality
description: Evaluates the quality of image generation prompts from the image prompt phase.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.criteria: Are image prompts specific enough to generate the intended visual? Do they include concrete details about subject, composition, lighting, and style?

scoringGuide.excellent: Prompts are highly specific with detailed subject descriptions, composition guidance, lighting, color palette, and style references.
scoringGuide.good: Good specificity with most visual aspects covered. Minor areas left to model interpretation.
scoringGuide.adequate: Basic prompts that convey the general idea but lack precision.
scoringGuide.poor: Vague prompts that could generate wildly different images.

dimensions.name: character_consistency
dimensions.criteria: Do image prompts maintain consistent character descriptions across scenes? Would the same character be recognizable across generated images?

scoringGuide.excellent: Character descriptions are consistent and detailed across all scenes. Same visual identity maintained.
scoringGuide.good: Mostly consistent. Minor variations that shouldn't affect recognition.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some inconsistencies in character descriptions across scenes.
scoringGuide.poor: Characters described differently across scenes. Would not look like the same person.

dimensions.name: scene_faithfulness
dimensions.criteria: Do the image prompts faithfully represent the scene descriptions? Are all key elements from the scene present in the prompt?

scoringGuide.excellent: Every key element from the scene description is captured in the image prompt.
scoringGuide.good: Most scene elements present. Minor details omitted.
scoringGuide.adequate: Core scene represented but missing several important visual elements.
scoringGuide.poor: Image prompt significantly diverges from the scene description.

dimensions.name: technical_quality
dimensions.criteria: Are prompts well-structured for the target image generation model? Do they follow best practices (no conflicting instructions, appropriate length)?

scoringGuide.excellent: Prompts follow best practices for image generation. Well-structured, no conflicts, appropriate length.
scoringGuide.good: Good structure overall. Minor formatting issues.
scoringGuide.adequate: Functional but not optimized. Some awkward phrasing or conflicting directions.
scoringGuide.poor: Poorly structured prompts. Conflicting instructions or inappropriate length.
